Parameter.label: Line groups (empty list means any line)
List of dial strings to be used
Diversion Reason 0: None 1: Unknown 2: Busy 3: No answer 4: Unavilable 5: Unconditional 6: Time of day 7: Do not disturb 8: Deflection 9: Follow-me 10: Out of service 11: Away 255: Other
True: Claim control of this call

Parameter.name: Condition
Parameter.value: bExternalCall and not bInvalidSecurity and not bDialPlanError

Step.label: Error
Step.notes: $HandlerName & " (" & $PreviousStepID & "): " & "Could not transfer due to invalid phone number: " & GetHead(lsParameters)

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: $HandlerName & " (" & $PreviousStepID & "): " & "Could not transfer due to invalid phone number: " & GetHead(lsParameters)

Step.label: Error
Step.notes: "Error reading structured parameter " & sStructuredParameterName & " in step " & $PreviousStepID

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "Error reading structured parameter " & sStructuredParameterName & " in step " & $PreviousStepID

Step.label: Error
Step.notes: $HandlerName & "(" & $PreviousStepID & "): Fout bij het lezen van de Structured Parameter. Element=" & sName & "_Prompt"

Parameter.label: Message to be placed in the log.
Parameter.value: $HandlerName & "(" & $PreviousStepID & "): Fout bij het lezen van de Structured Parameter. Element=" & sStructuredParameterName & "_Prompt"

Step.label: Error
Step.notes: "Error reading structured parameter " & sStructuredParameterName & " in step " & $PreviousStepID

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "Error reading structured parameter " & sStructuredParameterName & " in step " & $PreviousStepID

Step.label: p_NextStep = Failure
Step.notes: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Failure", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Failure", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Failure", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Failure", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Step.label: p_NextStep = Failure
Step.notes: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Failure", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Failure", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Failure", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Failure", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Step.label: p_NextStep = Disconnect
Step.notes: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Step.label: p_NextStep = Transfer
Step.notes: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Transfer", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Transfer", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Transfer", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Transfer", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Step.label: p_NextStep = Continue
Step.notes: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Continue", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Continue", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Continue", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Continue", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Step.label: p_bNextStepForced
Step.notes: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Step.label: p_bNextStepForced
Step.notes: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Step.label: p_bNextStepForced
Step.notes: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Step.label: p_bNextStepForced
Step.notes: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))

Step.label: p_bNextStepForced
Step.notes: Test(StrLen(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0))) > 0, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep_Disconnect", 0)), GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "NextStep", 0)))
